svg.text: The final sprint (Fri 07-10 → Sun 07-12): the whole plan
as one hour budget — 45 Kaggle + 30 Colab + a no-GPU analysis day
docs/plan_final_sprint_unified.md — one systematic schedule replacing the per-thread run lists; throughput ~8 min per seed-round on Qwen T4, ~17 min on OLMo
dose ladder on final Instruct — stop at order-balanced
risk 0.25–0.40 with the EV gate and judge-taste headroom
every Kaggle script piloted before the window; plumbing
IF K1’s per-round vintages landed and hours remain —
else explicitly next window. + reserve ~6 h (non-T4
mod65 × {evolving self · frozen round-0 copy · frozen
frozen-base arms double as the order-balanced
conservative organism × the same 4 judge conditions × 3
frozen-conservative vs frozen-base is the causal claim —
the candid grid). Reads: em_freegen + self_report.
neutral} × 3 seeds × 4 rounds. Does content shift the
fixed point, the stiffness, or the noise? + buffer ~7 h.
refit on order-balanced data; the composition cells
give the bias-free field samples the exploratory AR(1)
merged-delta norms/cosines from the newly persisted
adapters → un-withdraw or kill the thrash result; CPU
SVD; α-scaling is the causal leg.
does taste_t predict Δx_{t+1} across K1/K2/K3? — the
co-evolution force, replacing the retired criterion
across every new cell, one figure system.
per cell: order gap, EV gate, invalid rate, entropy,
measure-only drift — one table that certifies every
